question_text: In which city out of the given four cities has the price of petrol decreased by the maximum percentage?
explanation:
Following is the complete list: Date Petrol Diesel Change (+/–) Change (+/–) May 2004 33.70 21.74 16 June 2004 35.71 22.74 (+1.00) +2.01 1 August 2004 36.81 24.16 (+1.42) +1.10 5 November 2004 39.00 26.28 +2.12 +2.19 16 November 2004 37.84 –1.16 1 April 2005 (VAT) 37.99 + 0.15 28.22 + 1.94 5 May 2005 26.45 (–1.77) (VAT on diesel) 21 June 2005 40.49 + 2.50 28.45 (+2.00) 7 September 2005 43.49 30.45 (+2.00) +3.00 1 April 2006 43.51 30.47 (+0.02) +0.02 5 June 2006 47.51 32.47 +4.00 (+2.00) 16 June 2006 46.85 32.25 –0.66 (–0.22) 30 November 2006 44.85 31.25 –2.00 (–1.00) 15 February 2007 42.85 30.25 –2.00 (–1.00)

By simple observation we can realize in each case the decrease is almost by ₹2. So, the maximum % decrease will be for the city for which price was minimum & that city is Delhi (try to solve without actual calculation).
